EDCP672 Social & Cognitive Foundations of Counseling & School Psychology (3 Credits)

In depth examination of theoretical approaches and issues of social and cognitive psychology.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

Credit Only Granted for. EDCP672 or EDCP789E.
